metadata.description: BladeForge — aquivalabs Claude Code skills marketplace.

plugins.name: cicero
plugins.description: CICERO — the house voice. A SessionStart hook injects the always-on communication style (bottom line first, concise, plain language, recommend-don't-survey, push back, honesty, stay in scope) + a start banner; a Stop hook enforces principles 12/2/3 (reply in the user's language, concise, gloss/translate jargon) by blocking an off-voice reply so it gets rewritten.
